title: gorteria diffusa subsp. diffusa
intro: Gorteria diffusa subsp. diffusa, also known as the Cape dune elder or yellow dune elder, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern coast of South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Gorteria diffusa subsp. diffusa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
